name: Harvey Weinstein

acts.description: Convicted of rape in the first and third degree in 2020 New York trial
Dozens of additional allegations of rape, assault, and harassment spanning over 30 years
Systematic use of NDAs and industry power to silence and intimidate victims

behavior_summary: Convicted rapist whose decades of predation in Hollywood defined an entire era of abuse. Used the casting couch as a weapon of mass destruction.

art.summary: Produced major Oscar-winning films and shaped independent cinema, but as a producer, not a creative author.

accountability_events: 2020 convicted of rape in New York
2023 convicted of rape in Los Angeles

verdict.blurb: He didn't make the movies — he made careers disappear. Watching films he produced doesn't enrich him anymore, but it still enriches the myth of a machine built on assault. The art survived him. The victims are still surviving too.
